stemHtml: ATC clears: "Globe Air 123 cleared to London Heathrow flight plan route, FL210, squawk 4577." What is the correct readback?

options.a: "Globe Air 123 is cleared to London Heathrow flight plan route, FL210, squawk 4577".
options.b: "Globe Air 123 is cleared flight plan route, FL210, squawk 4577".
options.c: "Cleared as filed, climb to FL210, squawk 4577, Globe Air 123".
options.d: "Cleared to London Heathrow flight plan route, FL210, squawk 4577, Globe Air 123".
